secretFields.name: apiKey
secretFields.label: Explorer API key
secretFields.description: Etherscan (or compatible explorer) API key. Optional: leave empty for explorers that do not require a key.

secretFields.name: baseUrl
secretFields.label: Explorer API base URL
secretFields.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.etherscan.io/v2/api. Set to a standalone explorer endpoint (e.g. a Blockscout /api) to target that explorer directly.

secretFields.name: chainId
secretFields.label: Chain ID
secretFields.description: Chain ID for the Etherscan V2 unified endpoint, e.g. 1 for Ethereum, 8453 for Base, 999 for HyperEVM. Leave empty when pointing baseUrl at a standalone single-chain explorer.
